Scenario Comparison Report

3 scenario(s) · Analysis period: 20XX-00-00 ~ 20XX-00-00

Comparison Overview

Aggregate base: 2 — movement, total_seat_count. (Base metric for aggregation.)

Analysis period: 20XX-00-00 ~ 20XX-00-00

Locations: Ter A, Ter B, Ter C

Scenarios compared: Best, Current, Bad — Dep/Arr metrics are shown separately in the charts and tables below.

Scenario summary: For each scenario, total (seats or movement by aggregate), required facilities, excess as % of total, and delay (h) are shown per location × Dep/Arr combination (e.g. Ter B Dep, Ter B Arr, Ter D Dep, Ter D Arr).

Current
Ter A [Ter A] Airline 2[Ter A] Airline 4[Ter A] Airline 5[Ter A] Airline 7[Ter A] Airline 11[Ter B] Airline 17[Ter B] Airline 18[Ter C] Airline 18[Ter C] Airline 20
Ter B [Ter A] Airline 13[Ter A] Airline 15[Ter B] Airline 16[Ter C] Airline 1[Ter C] Airline 3[Ter C] Airline 6[Ter C] Airline 8[Ter C] Airline 10[Ter C] Airline 19
Ter C [Ter A] Airline 12[Ter A] Airline 14[Ter B] Airline 9[Ter C] Airline 21[Ter C] Airline 22[Ter C] Airline 23[Ter E] Airline 24[Ter E] Airline 25
Bad
Ter A [Ter A] Airline 2[Ter A] Airline 4[Ter A] Airline 5[Ter A] Airline 7[Ter A] Airline 11[Ter A] Airline 14[Ter A] Airline 15[Ter B] Airline 9[Ter C] Airline 18[Ter C] Airline 19[Ter C] Airline 20

Common Indicators (bar charts)

Dep / Arr (97.5%)

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns (solid, slash, dots, backslash, x, etc.). Red dashed line: Capacity.

Dep / Arr (95%)

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns (solid, slash, dots, backslash, x, etc.). Red dashed line: Capacity.

Excess as % of total · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns for each combination.

Total Delay Hours (Capacity) · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total delay hours from capacity constraint (cascading overflow). Same color per scenario.

Avg Delay (per throughput) · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total Delay Hours ÷ Throughput. Average delay per unit. Same color per scenario.

Avg Seat · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total seats ÷ Total flights. Independent of aggregate base. Same color per scenario.

Time Series

Select scenario, then location and Dep/Arr.

Ter B [Ter A] Airline 13[Ter A] Airline 15[Ter B] Airline 16[Ter C] Airline 1[Ter C] Airline 3[Ter C] Airline 6[Ter C] Airline 8[Ter C] Airline 10[Ter C] Airline 19

Ter A [Ter A] Airline 2[Ter A] Airline 4[Ter A] Airline 5[Ter A] Airline 7[Ter A] Airline 11[Ter A] Airline 14[Ter A] Airline 15[Ter B] Airline 9[Ter C] Airline 18[Ter C] Airline 19[Ter C] Airline 20

Common Indicators (bar charts)

Dep / Arr (97.5%)

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns (solid, slash, dots, backslash, x, etc.). Red dashed line: Capacity.

Dep / Arr (95%)

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns (solid, slash, dots, backslash, x, etc.). Red dashed line: Capacity.

Excess as % of total · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Same color per scenario. Dep/Arr/Both × locations: distinct patterns for each combination.

Total Delay Hours (Capacity) · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total delay hours from capacity constraint (cascading overflow). Same color per scenario.

Avg Delay (per throughput) · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total Delay Hours ÷ Throughput. Average delay per unit. Same color per scenario.

Avg Seat · By location × Dep/Arr/Both

Total seats ÷ Total flights. Independent of aggregate base. Same color per scenario.

Time Series

Select scenario, then location and Dep/Arr.
